author: aleju
best_prompt: Prioritize aggressive reordering of logical blocks and conditionals to maximize the disruption of token-level n-gram patterns across the Random Forest and Neural Network classifiers. Extract significant complex logic into new helper functions and relocate code segments between modules to alter cosine distance without modifying any variable names or formatting. Merge existing class hierarchies and reorder function call structures to increase the JS divergence while strictly maintaining code functionality and semantic integrity.
initial_prompt: Restructure this Python code to disguise the author's style. Extract inline logic into helper functions, reorder statements, and split or merge functions. Do NOT rename variables, change comments, alter formatting, or modify control flow.
